dependencies.name: idna
dependencies.mediation: Pinned by Mend from constraints.txt at scan time (idna==3.7). poetry.lock (committed) shows idna==3.15 because Poetry does NOT read constraints.txt natively. Mend applies the constraint independently of the lockfile. One of two constraints exercised by this probe.

dependencies.name: urllib3
dependencies.mediation: Pinned by Mend from constraints.txt at scan time (urllib3==1.26.18). poetry.lock (committed) shows urllib3==2.7.0 because Poetry does NOT read constraints.txt natively. Mend applies the constraint independently of the lockfile. Two of two constraints exercised by this probe.

summary.constraint_applied: urllib3==1.26.18 AND idna==3.7 via constraints.txt (overlaid on Poetry-resolved tree)
summary.notes: Two simultaneous transitive pins. poetry.lock diverges from scan output at BOTH urllib3 (lock=2.7.0, scan=1.26.18) AND idna (lock=3.15, scan=3.7). Constraint-iteration code path.
